response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core stack of this role. There is no demonstrated depth in Java, Kotlin, JVM internals, or the Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus ecosystem, and no IDE or language-tooling experience. Java appears only briefly (LabWindows/CVI C/C++ work and some robotics) over a decade ago. Strengths in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang do not transfer well to the deep JVM and enterprise-framework focus required here.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Some prior IDE-adjacent C/C++ work at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos, public talks
concerns: No demonstrable senior-level Java or Kotlin experience; JVM depth not evidenced
No Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or application-server work shown
No language-tooling, compiler, or modern IDE-internals experience

key_factors.factor: General senior engineering and tooling craftsmanship
